sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45709" key="e)fhbei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφηβ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n45709.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">principal court</tr_> in the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παλαίστρα</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.11.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
